scripts.build:recruitment: node "%npm_execpath%" run build --workspace=recruitment && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path recruitment/dist/* -Destination dist -Recurse -Force"
scripts.build:relations: node "%npm_execpath%" run build --workspace=employee-relations && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path employee-relations-dist -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Path employee-relations/dist -Destination employee-relations-dist -Recurse -Force"
scripts.build:all: node "%npm_execpath%" run build:onboarding && node "%npm_execpath%" run build:recruitment && node "%npm_execpath%" run build:relations
